sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72355" key="oi)koporei=a" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκο-πορεῖα·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ κατ᾽ οἰκίαν σκεύη,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
